documents.summary: The dms brightness command provides a unified command-line interface for managing brightness levels across integrated backlights, LED indicators, and external DDC/I2C monitors. documents.summary: This document provides instructions for integrating and synchronizing CalDAV-compatible calendars into the DMS dashboard using vdirsyncer and khal.

documents.title: Brightness Control | Dank Linux
documents.description: Control backlight, LED, and DDC/I2C monitor brightness
documents.summary: This document provides a comprehensive command-line reference for the dms brightness tool, which centralizes control for laptop backlights, indicator LEDs, and external monitors via DDC/CI. It details commands for listing, retrieving, and adjusting brightness levels, including support for non-linear exponential scaling.

documents.title: Clipboard Manager | Dank Linux
documents.description: Wayland clipboard manager with history, search, and persistence
documents.summary: This document provides a comprehensive command-line reference for the dms cl Wayland clipboard manager, covering core operations, history management, and system configuration.

documents.title: Color Picker | Dank Linux
documents.description: Pick colors from anywhere on your Wayland screen with multiple output formats
documents.summary: Explains how to use the dms color pick CLI tool to capture colors from a Wayland screen with support for various output formats and custom templates.

documents.title: Dank16 | Dank Linux
documents.description: Generate Base16 color palettes from a single color with intelligent contrast handling
documents.summary: This document provides a reference for the dms dank16 command, a tool that generates complete Base16 color palettes and terminal configurations from a single hex color input.

documents.title: System Diagnostics (doctor) | Dank Linux
documents.description: Diagnose DMS installation, dependencies, and system configuration
documents.summary: This document describes the dms doctor command, which is used to diagnose system configurations, verify dependencies, and troubleshoot Dank Material Shell (DMS) installations.

documents.title: Keybinds & Cheatsheets | Dank Linux
documents.description: Manage and display keybinds and cheatsheets for various applications

documents.title: Process Management | Dank Linux
documents.description: Manage DankMaterialShell processes with run, restart, and kill commands
documents.summary: This document explains how to use the dms command-line interface to manage the DankMaterialShell backend and its associated Quickshell UI processes, including execution modes and system integration.

documents.title: Screenshot | Dank Linux
documents.description: Capture screenshots from Wayland displays with multiple modes and formats
documents.summary: This document provides a comprehensive reference for the dms screenshot command, detailing its capture modes, output formats, and command-line options for Wayland displays.

documents.description: <Hero
